name: Four Treasure Soup
recipeIngredient: 1/4 pound boned, skinned chicken, cut into bite-sized pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Mince half of the water chestnuts and combine with chicken, 2 tablespoons of chopped onions, soy sauce, mustard, and flour. Reserve remaining water chestnuts and onions.
2. In a large saucepan, mix broth, sherry, and garlic powder; bring to a boil.
3. Drop chicken mixture by teaspoonfuls into the boiling broth.
4. Add carrots and simmer for 3 to 4 minutes until meatballs are cooked.
5. Add remaining water chestnuts, green onions, and pea pods.
6. Heat through and serve immediately.
